name: PEP8 (Python)
feature: 4-space indentation; spaces around operators and after commas
example:
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

name: Google Java Style
feature: 2-space indentation; no space around operators and after commas

name: Rustfmt Default (Rust)
feature: 4-space indentation; spaces after commas and around operators

name: Prettier Default (JavaScript/TypeScript)
feature: 2-space indentation; consistent spaces around operators and after commas

name: Tab Indentation (Golang)
feature: Tab character for indentation; spaces after commas and around operators

name: 2-space with no spacing
feature: 2-space indentation; no spaces around operators or after commas

name: 4-space with no spacing
feature: 4-space indentation; no spaces around operators or after commas

name: tab indentation with no spacing
feature: Tab indentation; no spaces around operators or after commas
